role: A generated CSS custom-property token sheet that surfaces DNA's :root design-token vocabulary to the host surface so token-based styles (e.g., phone.css) can resolve values.
capabilities: Exposes color tokens (surfaces, identity palette, status, warmpoles, blueprint/table)
Serves as a generated extraction from piece.css (DNA source of truth)
substance_why: It declares a dense, complete :root vocabulary of colors, spacing, radius, type, shadows, layout margin, and device dimensions.
interactions_missing: No dynamic theme switching (e.g., dark mode) is wired
performance_risks: Monolithic :root block with 100+ custom properties could increase CSS memory/style-matching overhead
reuse_why: The token vocabulary and values are the real asset, but the generated flat CSS artifact should be rebuilt by a proper token pipeline.
decomposition_hints: Split color tokens from spacing/radius/type/shadow/device tokens
Separate semantic/theme tokens from raw palette values
Separate generated artifact from source-of-truth token definitions
